---
title: "Dashboard Test"
author: "MLBoss"
---

# Requêtes et taux de codification

```{python}
#| context: setup
#| output: false

import duckdb
from src import helpers, constants
```

```{python}
#| context: setup
#| output: false

helpers.init_duckdb_s3()
helpers.read_all_data("s3://projet-ape/log_files/dashboard_test/**/*.parquet")

min_max_dates = duckdb.sql(
    """
    SELECT
        min(date) as min_date,
        max(date) as max_date
    FROM data
    """
).to_df()
min_date = min_max_dates["min_date"][0]
max_date = min_max_dates["max_date"][0]
```

## Row {height=20%}

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| context: setup
#| output: false

daily_counts = duckdb.sql(
    """
    SELECT
        date,
        COUNT(*) AS nrow,
    FROM data
    GROUP BY date
    """
).to_df()
```


```{python}
#| context: setup
#| output: false
weekly_counts = duckdb.sql(
    """
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('week', date) AS week_start,
        COUNT(*) AS nrow,
    FROM data
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', date)
    """
).to_df()
```

```{python}
#| context: setup
#| component: valuebox
#| title: "Nombre de liasses"

dict(
    icon = "folder2-open",
    color = "secondary",
    value = daily_counts["nrow"].sum()
)
```

### Column {width=25%}

```{python}
from shiny import render, reactive, ui
from shinywidgets import render_widget

ui.input_slider(
    id="ic_auto_p1",
    label="IC minimum pour codification automatique",
    min=0.0,
    max=1.0,
    value=0.8
)
```

```{python}
#| output: false

@reactive.Calc
def auto_rate():
    return duckdb.sql(
        f"""
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS TotalRows,
            (COUNT(
                CASE WHEN data."Response.IC" > {input.ic_auto_p1()} THEN 1 END
                ) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)
            ) AS PercentageHighIC
        FROM data;
        """
    ).to_df().to_dict()
```

### Column {width=25%}

```{python}

@render.ui
def auto_rate_valuebox():
    icon = ui.HTML(
        """
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="currentColor" class="bi bi-folder-check" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
            <path d="m.5 3 .04.87a1.99 1.99 0 0 0-.342 1.311l.637 7A2 2 0 0 0 2.826 14H9v-1H2.826a1 1 0 0 1-.995-.91l-.637-7A1 1 0 0 1 2.19 4h11.62a1 1 0 0 1 .996 1.09L14.54 8h1.005l.256-2.819A2 2 0 0 0 13.81 3H9.828a2 2 0 0 1-1.414-.586l-.828-.828A2 2 0 0 0 6.172 1H2.5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2m5.672-1a1 1 0 0 1 .707.293L7.586 3H2.19c-.24 0-.47.042-.683.12L1.5 2.98a1 1 0 0 1 1-.98h3.672z"></path>
            <path d="M15.854 10.146a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .708l-3 3a.5.5 0 0 1-.707 0l-1.5-1.5a.5.5 0 0 1 .707-.708l1.146 1.147 2.646-2.647a.5.5 0 0 1 .708 0z"></path>
        </svg>
        """
    )

    return ui.value_box(
        title="Pourcentage de codif. auto.",
        value=f"{round(auto_rate()['PercentageHighIC'][0], 2)}%",
        theme="green",
        showcase=icon,
    )
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{python}
#| output: false

@reactive.Calc
def daily_auto_rates():
    return duckdb.sql(
        f"""
        SELECT
            date,
            (COUNT(
                CASE WHEN data."Response.IC" > {input.ic_auto_p1()} THEN 1 END
                ) / COUNT(*)
            ) AS PercentageHighIC
        FROM data
        GROUP BY date;
        """
    ).to_df()
```

```{python}
#| context: setup
#| title: Nombre de requêtes par jour
#| padding: 0

helpers.make_barplot(
    daily_counts,
    "date",
    "nrow",
)
```


```{python}
#| title: "Pourcentage de codification automatique par jour"
#| padding: 0

@render_widget
def plot_daily_auto_rates():
    return helpers.make_barplot(
        daily_auto_rates(),
        "date",
        "PercentageHighIC",
        color="PercentageHighIC",
        range_color=[0, 1],
        range_y=[0, 1],
    )
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{python}
#| context: setup
#| title: Nombre de requêtes par semaine
#| padding: 0

helpers.make_barplot(
    weekly_counts,
    "week_start",
    "nrow",
)
```


```{python}
#| output: false

@reactive.Calc
def weekly_auto_rates():
    return duckdb.sql(
        f"""
        SELECT
            DATE_TRUNC('week', date) AS week_start,
            (COUNT(
                CASE WHEN data."Response.IC" > {input.ic_auto_p1()} THEN 1 END
                ) / COUNT(*)
            ) AS PercentageHighIC
        FROM data
        GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', date);
        """
    ).to_df()
```

```{python}
#| title: "Pourcentage de codification automatique par semaine"
#| padding: 0

@render_widget
def plot_weekly_auto_rates():
    return helpers.make_barplot(
        weekly_auto_rates(),
        "week_start",
        "PercentageHighIC",
        color="PercentageHighIC",
        range_color=[0, 1],
        range_y=[0, 1],
    )
```

# Indices de confiance

## Row {height=20%}

### Column

```{python}
ui.input_slider(
    id="time_window_p2",
    label="Fenêtre temporelle",
    min=min_date,
    max=max_date,
    time_format="%F",
    value=(min_date, max_date)
)
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{python}
#| output: false

@reactive.Calc
def get_ic_time_frame():
    min_frame, max_frame = input.time_window_p2()
    ic_df = duckdb.sql(
        f"""
        SELECT
            "Response.IC"
        FROM data
        WHERE date >= '{min_frame}' AND date <= '{max_frame}'
        """
    ).to_df()
    return ic_df
```

```{python}
#| title: Distribution des indices de confiances
#| padding: 0

@render_widget
def plot_ic_histogram():
    return helpers.make_histogram(
        get_ic_time_frame(),
        "Response.IC",
        yaxis_title="Nombre de liasses",
    )
```

## Row

### Column {width=20%}

```{python}
ui.input_select(
    "aggregation_p2",
    "Niveau d'aggrégation:",
    choices=["Section", "Division"]
)

ui.input_slider(
    id="ic_auto_p2",
    label="IC minimum pour codification automatique",
    min=0.0,
    max=1.0,
    value=0.8
)
```

### Column {width=80%}

```{python}
#| output: false

@reactive.Calc
def codification_rates():
    min_frame, max_frame = input.time_window_p2()
    ic_code_df = duckdb.sql(
        f"""
        SELECT
            "Response.IC",
            "Response.1.code" as "sous-classe",
            CASE
                WHEN "Response.IC" > {input.ic_auto_p2()} THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS "auto"
        FROM data
        WHERE date >= '{min_frame}' AND date <= '{max_frame}'
        """
    ).to_df()

    ic_code_df["division"] = ic_code_df['sous-classe'].str[:-3]
    ic_code_df["section"] = ic_code_df['division'].map(constants.NAF_SECTIONS)

    aggregation_level = input.aggregation_p2().lower()
    data = ic_code_df.groupby(aggregation_level)["auto"].mean().reset_index()
    data = data.sort_values(by=aggregation_level)
    return data
```

```{python}
#| title: Taux de codification automatique
#| padding: 0

@render_widget
def plot_auto_percentages():
    return helpers.make_barplot(
        data=codification_rates(),
        var_x=input.aggregation_p2().lower(),
        xaxis_title=input.aggregation_p2(),
        var_count="auto",
        color="auto",
        range_color=[0, 1],
        range_y=[0, 1],
    )
```

# Codes prédits

## Row {height=20%}

### Column {width=40%}

```{python}
ui.input_slider(
    id="time_window_p3_a",
    label="Fenêtre temporelle A",
    min=min_date,
    max=max_date,
    time_format="%F",
    value=(min_date, max_date)
)
```


### Column {width=20%}

```{python}
ui.input_select(
    "aggregation_p3",
    "Niveau d'aggrégation:",
    choices=["Sous-classe", "Classe", "Groupe", "Division", "Section"]
)
```

### Column {width=40%}

```{python}
ui.input_slider(
    id="time_window_p3_b",
    label="Fenêtre temporelle B",
    min=min_date,
    max=max_date,
    time_format="%F",
    value=(min_date, max_date)
)

ui.input_checkbox(
    "checkbox",
    label="Afficher fenêtre B",
    value=False,
)
```

## Row

```{python}
#| output: false
import pandas as pd

def nrow_code_date(frame):
    min_frame, max_frame = frame
    data = duckdb.sql(
        f"""
        SELECT
            "Response.1.code" as "sous-classe",
            COUNT(*) AS nrow
        FROM data
        WHERE date >= '{min_frame}' AND date <= '{max_frame}'
        GROUP BY "Response.1.code"
        """
    ).to_df()
    data["classe"] = data['sous-classe'].str[:-1]
    data["groupe"] = data['sous-classe'].str[:-2]
    data["division"] = data['sous-classe'].str[:-3]
    data["section"] = data['division'].map(constants.NAF_SECTIONS)
    return data

@reactive.Calc
def p3_df():
    # TODO: plot percentage per class
    aggregation_level = input.aggregation_p3().lower()

    data = nrow_code_date(input.time_window_p3_a())
    data = data.groupby(aggregation_level)["nrow"].sum().reset_index()
    data["date"] = "A"

    if input.checkbox():
        data_b = nrow_code_date(input.time_window_p3_b())
        data_b = data_b.groupby(aggregation_level)["nrow"].sum().reset_index()
        data_b["date"] = "B"

        data = pd.concat([
            data,
            data_b
        ])

    return data.sort_values(by=["date", aggregation_level])
```


```{python}
@render_widget
def plot_code_distr():
    return helpers.make_barplot(
        p3_df(),
        input.aggregation_p3().lower(),
        "nrow",
        yaxis_title="Nombre de liasses",
        color="date",
        barmode="group"
    )
```
